title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Packet Lens: Net Device Hardening Nac
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net device hardening nac increment in a defense-in-depth network security plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Disable unused ports and services, change defaults, use port security, 802.1X, MAC filtering limits, and key management.
Explain DoS or DDoS, phishing, dumpster diving, shoulder surfing, tailgating, and malware network impact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
